missing_fact_updates.label: Property owner authorization
missing_fact_updates.reason: The refreshed process model requires owner authorization before application submission can be treated as ready.

missing_fact_updates.label: Contractor license status
missing_fact_updates.reason: Trade-related fixture options can depend on license details in the DevHub profile.

stale_evidence_updates.label: Site plan revision date
stale_evidence_updates.reason: The latest file-preparation guidance should be checked before relying on an older site plan set.

conflicting_evidence_updates.label: Project scope description
conflicting_evidence_updates.reason: The current case notes describe both an interior remodel and a residential addition, which may lead to different application questions.

missing_document_updates.label: Structural calculations PDF
missing_document_updates.reason: The refreshed process model expects calculations to be staged as a separate PDF when required by the project scope.
